temporal_description: A high-angle, slightly shaky shot looks down into a busy, modern office building lobby. The audio is filled with the loud, echoing sound of multiple pairs of feet running quickly across a hard, possibly tiled, floor. The sound is a rapid, percussive clatter that creates a sense of urgency and commotion. In the foreground, the dark silhouettes of people's heads and shoulders are visible, suggesting the camera is positioned on an upper level. Below, a group of men in business attire, mostly light blue shirts, are seen walking and milling about in a well-lit, open-plan area. The lobby features a checkered tile floor, a staircase on the right, and a reception desk in the background. The overall lighting is cool and functional. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in a white, stylized font. The camera pans slightly, following the movement of the people in the lobby. The camera cuts to a medium close-up, focusing on a man in the center of the group. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a light blue collared shirt with a patterned tie. He has a serious, focused expression as he walks forward. Other men in similar business attire are visible around him, some in focus and others blurred in the background. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The shot is tight on the man's face and upper body, emphasizing his determined look as he navigates through the crowd. There is no dialogue or background music, making the sound of the hurried footsteps the central and most prominent element of the audio.
